response.justification: While the candidate clears the 15-year experience bar and shows genuine breadth across stacks and domains, the role demands deep, demonstrated AI expertise and a director-level strategic advisory profile — neither of which this resume supports. AI involvement is limited to a two-month-old current role with MCP tooling, there is no advanced AI/ML education, no record of advising enterprise customers on AI strategy, and no published thought leadership in the space beyond a 2019 GIS talk.
strengths: 20 years of continuous engineering work across a wide range of domains and stacks
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective — a self-started, open-source, production platform with real users
High-scale systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/second at Sociomantic) shows infrastructure credibility
concerns: AI expertise is superficial and very recent — only two months of AI-agent work, no ML background or AI product ownership at meaningful scale
No evidence of director-level impact, technical strategy ownership, or advising enterprise customers on cloud/AI adoption
Education is a BS in Computer Science plus a Fine Arts degree — no advanced AI/ML credential that the role prefers

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI depth and track record
Breadth of engineering experience and entrepreneurial projects
